speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: I am come to survey the Tower this day.

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: Since Henry’s death I fear there is conveyance.

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: Where be these warders that they wait not here?—

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: Open the gates! ’Tis Gloucester that calls.

speaker:
FIRST
               
              WARDER
text: Who’s there that knocks so imperiously?

speaker:
FIRST
               
              SERVINGMAN
text: It is the noble Duke of Gloucester.

speaker:
SECOND
               
              WARDER
text: Whoe’er he be, you may not be let in.

speaker:
FIRST
               
              SERVINGMAN
text: Villains, answer you so the Lord Protector?

speaker:
FIRST
               
              WARDER
text: The Lord protect him, so we answer him.

speaker:
FIRST
               
              WARDER
text: We do no otherwise than we are willed.

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: Who willed you? Or whose will stands but mine?

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: There’s none Protector of the realm but I.—

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: Break up the gates! I’ll be your warrantize.

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: Shall I be flouted thus by dunghill grooms?

speaker: WOODVILLE
text: What noise is this? What traitors have we here?

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: Lieutenant, is it you whose voice I hear?

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: Open the gates. Here’s Gloucester that would enter.

speaker: WOODVILLE
text: Have patience, noble duke, I may not open.

speaker: WOODVILLE
text: The Cardinal of Winchester forbids.

speaker: WOODVILLE
text: From him I have express commandment

speaker: WOODVILLE
text: That thou nor none of thine shall be let in.

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: Fainthearted Woodville, prizest him ’fore me?

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: Arrogant Winchester, that haughty prelate

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: Whom Henry, our late sovereign, ne’er could brook?

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: Thou art no friend to God or to the King.

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: Open the gates, or I’ll shut thee out shortly.

speaker: SERVINGMEN
text: Open the gates unto the Lord Protector,

speaker: SERVINGMEN
text: Or we’ll burst them open if that you come not quickly.

speaker: WINCHESTER
text: How now, ambitious Humphrey, what means this?

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: Peeled priest, dost thou command me to be shut out?

speaker: WINCHESTER
text: I do, thou most usurping proditor—

speaker: WINCHESTER
text: And not Protector—of the King or realm.

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: Stand back, thou manifest conspirator,

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: Thou that contrived’st to murder our dead lord,

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: Thou that giv’st whores indulgences to sin!

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: I’ll canvass thee in thy broad cardinal’s hat

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: If thou proceed in this thy insolence.

speaker: WINCHESTER
text: Nay, stand thou back. I will not budge a foot.

speaker: WINCHESTER
text: This be Damascus; be thou cursèd Cain

speaker: WINCHESTER
text: To slay thy brother Abel, if thou wilt.

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: I will not slay thee, but I’ll drive thee back.

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: Thy scarlet robes, as a child’s bearing-cloth,

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: I’ll use to carry thee out of this place.

speaker: WINCHESTER
text: Do what thou dar’st, I beard thee to thy face.

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: What, am I dared and bearded to my face?—

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: Draw, men, for all this privilegèd place.

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: Blue coats to tawny coats!

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: Priest, beware your beard.

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: I mean to tug it and to cuff you soundly.

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: Under my feet I’ll stamp thy cardinal’s hat;

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: In spite of pope or dignities of Church,

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: Here by the cheeks I’ll drag thee up and down.

speaker: WINCHESTER
text: Gloucester, thou wilt answer this before the Pope.

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: Winchester goose, I cry “a rope, a rope!”—

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: Now beat them hence; why do you let them stay?—

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: Thee I’ll chase hence, thou wolf in sheep’s array.—

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: Out, tawny coats, out, scarlet hypocrite!

speaker: MAYOR
text: Fie, lords, that you, being supreme magistrates,

speaker: MAYOR
text: Thus contumeliously should break the peace!

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: Peace, Mayor? Thou know’st little of my wrongs.

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: Here’s Beaufort, that regards nor God nor king,

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: Hath here distrained the Tower to his use.

speaker: WINCHESTER
text: Here’s Gloucester, a foe to citizens,

speaker: WINCHESTER
text: One that still motions war and never peace,

speaker: WINCHESTER
text: O’ercharging your free purses with large fines;

speaker: WINCHESTER
text: That seeks to overthrow religion

speaker: WINCHESTER
text: Because he is Protector of the realm,

speaker: WINCHESTER
text: And would have armor here out of the Tower

speaker: WINCHESTER
text: To crown himself king and suppress the Prince.

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: I will not answer thee with words, but blows.

speaker: MAYOR
text: Naught rests for me in this tumultuous strife

speaker: MAYOR
text: But to make open proclamation.

speaker: MAYOR
text: Come, officer, as loud as e’er thou canst, cry.

speaker: OFFICER
text:
All
                 
                manner
                 
                of
                 
                men
                ,
                 
                assembled
                 
                here
                 
                in
                
                arms
                 
                this
                 
                day
                 
                against
                 
                God’s
                 
                peace
                 
                and
                 
                the
                 
                King’s
                ,
                 
                we
                
                charge
                 
                and
                 
                command
                 
                you
                ,
                 
                in
                 
                his
                 
                Highness’
                 
                name
                ,
                 
                to
                
                repair
                 
                to
                 
                your
                 
                several
                 
                dwelling
                 
                places
                ,
                 
                and
                 
                not
                 
                to
                
                wear
                ,
                 
                handle
                ,
                 
                or
                 
                use
                 
                any
                 
                sword
                ,
                 
                weapon
                ,
                 
                or
                 
                dagger
                
                henceforward
                ,
                 
                upon
                 
                pain
                 
                of
                 
                death
                .

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: Cardinal, I’ll be no breaker of the law,

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: But we shall meet and break our minds at large.

speaker: WINCHESTER
text: Gloucester, we’ll meet to thy cost, be sure.

speaker: WINCHESTER
text: Thy heartblood I will have for this day’s work.

speaker: MAYOR
text: I’ll call for clubs if you will not away.

speaker: MAYOR
text:
(
                Aside
                .
                )
                 
              This cardinal’s more haughty than the devil!

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: Mayor, farewell. Thou dost but what thou mayst.

speaker: WINCHESTER
text: Abominable Gloucester, guard thy head,

speaker: WINCHESTER
text: For I intend to have it ere long.

speaker: MAYOR
text: See the coast cleared, and then we will depart.

speaker: MAYOR
text:
(
                Aside
                .
                )
                 
              Good God, these nobles should such stomachs bear!

speaker: MAYOR
text: I myself fight not once in forty year.
